targets.notes: Microsoft has stated it will be carbon negative by 2030 across its Scope 1, 2 and 3 emissions by reducing emissions and investing in carbon removal.
targets.title: Carbon negative by 2030 (Scopes 1–3)

targets.notes: As part of its carbon-negative plan, Microsoft has indicated it will reduce its total Scope 1, 2 and 3 emissions by more than half by 2030 relative to a recent baseline year.
targets.title: Reduce company-wide emissions by more than half by 2030

targets.boundary: Company-wide historical Scope 1 and 2 emissions since 1975
targets.notes: Microsoft has pledged that by 2050 it will remove from the environment all the carbon it has emitted directly and from electricity use since its founding.
targets.title: Remove all historical Scope 1 and 2 emissions by 2050
